  if [[ -f "$file" ]]; then
    perms=$(stat -c %a "$file")
    if [[ "$perms" == "600" ]]; then
      continue
    fi
  fi
  echo "$file"
done < "$WORK_DIR/filelist" > "$WORK_DIR/filtered_filelist"

# Process files

  # Skip the source directory itself
  if [[ "$file" == "$SRC_DIR" ]]; then
    continue

    # Check by file command

      is_text=true
    else
      # Check by extension
      case "$file" in

          is_text=true
